case_title: JAMES E CASTRO VS. FENG LIANG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "(SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT IS OUT OF THE COUNTRY. RETURN DATE NOT KNOWN)". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, JAMES E AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, FENG
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE; REQUEST TO RESET COURT DATE AND UPDATE ADDRESS; FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, JAMES E
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CASTRO, JAMES E AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, FENG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-12-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-14-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-12-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. APPEARANCE BY BENJAMIN GIANG--CANTONESE INTERPRETER, WHO WAS ASSIGNED TO INTERPRET FOR THE PLAINTIFF. THE INTERPRETER LEFT THE COURTROOM AT 10:15AM AS PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, JAMES E
